description.default: Show who on the team is out of office and, for a manager, the time-off requests waiting for them to approve. Use whenever the user asks who's out, who's on vacation or sick leave this week, who is away, the team's time off, time-off coverage, or about pending approvals / requests waiting for me to approve / time off I need to approve. Renders a live 'who's out' list of approved upcoming absences for the whole team and, when the signed-in user is an approver, an inbox where they can Approve or Decline each pending request inline; approving an upcoming request makes that person appear under who's out. Optional arguments: view ('whosOut' or 'approvals') to focus one section, and startDate / endDate (yyyy-mm-dd) for the window of interest.
